chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH ٩٢ SUKKUR C.P No.D-1205 of Date Order with signature of For hearing of main case 28.02.2024 Syed Israr Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr Ghulam Abbas Advocate for Pakistan Railways Mr Mian Imtiaz Ali Qureshi, Advocate for Responcent No 3 Mr Dareshani Ali Haider 'Ada', DAG n 4 » 4و٥ +*wr++#+ Petitioner is son of one Rehmatullah who served in Pakistan Railways as Chemist (BS-14) and lastly posted at Sleeper Factory Division Sukkur Petitioner has filed this petition for his appointment on son quota on any post in Pakistan Railways as per his qualification Learned DAG and learned Counse appearing for Respondents No 2 & 3 submit that since the retirement of father of the petitioner ٨0 005t has been announced However, ٥٨٥ when posts are announced the c٥5٤ petitioner would considered f٥r appointment ٥٨ 5٥٨ qu0t3 per his qualification by competent authority Pakistan Railway Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied this petition is accordingly disposed of copy of this order be communicated to the office of DAG Let representing the Pakistan Railways for perusal as well as Counsel and compliance 2017 ١٧٥٤٤ ٥wa٨٠ an٥
